description: Mexican criminal organization based in San Luis Potosí and Zacatecas, founded in 2012 by Iván Velázquez Caballero, a former member of Los Zetas. The group broke from Los Zetas and allied with the Gulf Cartel. Engaged in drug trafficking, particularly fentanyl, and migrant smuggling. Since 2019, they have fought alongside the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and Sinaloa Cartel for control of Zacatecas.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: San Luis Potosí Zacatecas with a minor presence in the State of Mexico and Quintana Roo
country_links.context: The organization has a minor presence in the State of Mexico and Quintana Roo.
